docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,000.00 FILED BY HASSAN, AHMED AS TO DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-03-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HASSAN, AHMED ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HASSAN, AHMED AS TO DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-03-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO APR-10-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. DEFENDANT TO DRAFT THE CONTRACT TO BE SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES. ONCE DONE, CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. VISITING JUDGE: JOHN FEENEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF AHMED HASSAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLIGIES, INC. IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
REMARK: PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS (SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT) RECEIVED AT THE WINDOW

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE JOSEPH HURLEY. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF AHMED HASSAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT BROUGHT THE SIGNED CONTRACT AS PER AGREEMENT BY ALL PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
